name: Deepscorn Casque
desc: An artifact of dark renown, convincing them they are already dead, instilling a strange reckless calm, Crafted from darksteel, its history is steeped in blood; its last owner met a grim fate during a forbidden Ministry Ritual to grow a murky, grotesque abomination. Grayhule failed his experiments and succumbed to his own shadows. Dare to don this helm at your own peril.
